{"parentUuid":"8e3e053a-dff6-4c78-9521-5a7aef0495ae","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_014WQHka4Us2E3bsut1deSE2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01NpsNrqv9N5wA283KNwGv3W","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/services/review-workflow.ts","content":"import { AnnouncementStatus, Role } from \"@prisma/client\";\nimport type { PrismaClient } from \"@prisma/client\";\n\nimport type { SessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport type {\n  VerificationAdapter,\n  VerificationResult,\n} from \"@/lib/adapters/verification\";\nimport { createReviewQueueClient } from \"@/lib/review-queue/src\";\nimport type { ClaimResult } from \"@/lib/review-queue/src\";\n\nexport class SelfReviewError extends Error {\n  constructor(message: string = \"reviewer cannot review their own item\") {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"SelfReviewError\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport class WorkflowAuthorizationError extends Error {\n  constructor(message: string = \"not authorized\") {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"WorkflowAuthorizationError\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport class WorkflowStateError extends Error {\n  constructor(message: string) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"WorkflowStateError\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport class WorkflowNotFoundError extends Error {\n  constructor(message: string) {\n    super(message);\n    this.name = \"WorkflowNotFoundError\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport interface ApproveItemDeps {\n  verification: VerificationAdapter;\n}\n\nexport interface EscalateResult {\n  escalated: number;\n}\n\nconst OVERDUE_AGE_MS = 48 * 60 * 60 * 1000;\n\nexport async function submitForReview(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  announcementId: string,\n  user: SessionUser\n): Promise<void> {\n  if (user.role !== Role.ADMIN && user.role !== Role.CONTENT_MANAGER) {\n    throw new WorkflowAuthorizationError(\n      \"only ADMIN or CONTENT_MANAGER may submit for review\"\n    );\n  }\n\n  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const announcement = await tx.announcement.findUnique({\n      where: { id: announcementId },\n    });\n    if (!announcement || announcement.deletedAt !== null) {\n      throw new WorkflowNotFoundError(\n        `announcement ${announcementId} not found`\n      );\n    }\n    if (announcement.status !== AnnouncementStatus.DRAFT) {\n      throw new WorkflowStateError(\n        `cannot submit announcement in status ${announcement.status}`\n      );\n    }\n\n    await tx.announcement.update({\n      where: { id: announcementId },\n      data: { status: AnnouncementStatus.PENDING_REVIEW },\n    });\n\n    const item = await tx.reviewQueueItem.create({\n      data: {\n        announcementId,\n        authorId: user.id,\n        status: \"PENDING\",\n        tier: 1,\n      },\n    });\n\n    await tx.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        action: \"SUBMIT_FOR_REVIEW\",\n        entity: \"Announcement\",\n        entityId: announcementId,\n        userId: user.id,\n        announcementId,\n        metadata: { reviewQueueItemId: item.id, tier: 1 },\n      },\n    });\n\n    await tx.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        action: \"NOTIFICATION_QUEUED\",\n        entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n        entityId: item.id,\n        userId: user.id,\n        announcementId,\n        metadata: {\n          recipientRole: \"COMPLIANCE_OFFICER\",\n          event: \"SUBMIT_FOR_REVIEW\",\n        },\n      },\n    });\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function claimNext(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  reviewer: SessionUser\n): Promise<ClaimResult> {\n  if (\n    reviewer.role !== Role.ADMIN &&\n    reviewer.role !== Role.COMPLIANCE_OFFICER\n  ) {\n    throw new WorkflowAuthorizationError(\n      \"only ADMIN or COMPLIANCE_OFFICER may claim review items\"\n    );\n  }\n\n  const queue = createReviewQueueClient(prisma);\n\n  // Visible-to-reviewer pre-check: if no non-self item is pending, skip the\n  // claim entirely so we don't lock a self-authored row.\n  const visible = await queue.listPending({\n    excludeAuthorId: reviewer.id,\n    limit: 1,\n  });\n  if (visible.length === 0) {\n    return { kind: \"empty\" };\n  }\n\n  const result = await queue.claimNextItem(reviewer.id);\n  if (result.kind === \"empty\") return result;\n\n  // Defence in depth — claimNextItem (SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) does\n  // not filter by author. If the oldest pending row turns out to be authored\n  // by the reviewer (race vs. listPending), release the row back to the pool\n  // and reject the claim.\n  if (result.item.authorId === reviewer.id) {\n    await prisma.reviewQueueItem.update({\n      where: { id: result.item.id },\n      data: {\n        status: \"PENDING\",\n        claimedBy: null,\n        claimedAt: null,\n      },\n    });\n    throw new SelfReviewError(\n      `reviewer ${reviewer.id} cannot claim own authored item`\n    );\n  }\n\n  return result;\n}\n\nexport async function approveItem(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  itemId: string,\n  reviewer: SessionUser,\n  note: string,\n  deps: ApproveItemDeps\n): Promise<VerificationResult> {\n  let announcementIdForAudit: string | null = null;\n\n  try {\n    return await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n      const item = await tx.reviewQueueItem.findUnique({\n        where: { id: itemId },\n        include: { announcement: true },\n      });\n      if (!item) {\n        throw new WorkflowNotFoundError(`review item ${itemId} not found`);\n      }\n      announcementIdForAudit = item.announcementId;\n\n      if (item.authorId === reviewer.id) {\n        throw new SelfReviewError();\n      }\n      if (item.claimedBy !== reviewer.id) {\n        throw new WorkflowAuthorizationError(\n          \"only the claiming reviewer may approve this item\"\n        );\n      }\n      if (item.status !== \"UNDER_REVIEW\") {\n        throw new WorkflowStateError(\n          `cannot approve an item in status ${item.status}`\n        );\n      }\n\n      // The seeded queue.approve wraps its update in its own\n      // prisma.$transaction; Prisma forbids interactive nested transactions on\n      // a TransactionClient, so we inline the equivalent update here. That\n      // keeps the queue change, announcement state change, and audit row\n      // atomic: if verification fails, all three roll back together.\n      await tx.reviewQueueItem.update({\n        where: { id: itemId },\n        data: {\n          status: \"APPROVED\",\n          decisionNote: note,\n          decidedAt: new Date(),\n        },\n      });\n\n      const verdict = await deps.verification.verify({\n        id: item.announcement.id,\n        titleEn: item.announcement.titleEn,\n        titleAr: item.announcement.titleAr,\n        bodyEn: item.announcement.bodyEn,\n        bodyAr: item.announcement.bodyAr,\n      });\n\n      if (verdict.verdict === \"APPROVED\") {\n        await tx.announcement.update({\n          where: { id: item.announcementId },\n          data: {\n            status: AnnouncementStatus.PUBLISHED,\n            publishedAt: new Date(),\n          },\n        });\n        await tx.auditLog.create({\n          data: {\n            action: \"VERIFICATION_PASSED\",\n            entity: \"Announcement\",\n            entityId: item.announcementId,\n            userId: reviewer.id,\n            announcementId: item.announcementId,\n            metadata: {\n              reviewQueueItemId: itemId,\n              verifiedAt: verdict.verifiedAt.toISOString(),\n            },\n          },\n        });\n      } else {\n        await tx.announcement.update({\n          where: { id: item.announcementId },\n          data: { status: AnnouncementStatus.DRAFT },\n        });\n        await tx.auditLog.create({\n          data: {\n            action: \"VERIFICATION_REJECTED\",\n            entity: \"Announcement\",\n            entityId: item.announcementId,\n            userId: reviewer.id,\n            announcementId: item.announcementId,\n            metadata: {\n              reviewQueueItemId: itemId,\n              reason: verdict.reason ?? null,\n              verifiedAt: verdict.verifiedAt.toISOString(),\n            },\n          },\n        });\n      }\n\n      return verdict;\n    });\n  } catch (err) {\n    const isWorkflowError =\n      err instanceof SelfReviewError ||\n      err instanceof WorkflowAuthorizationError ||\n      err instanceof WorkflowNotFoundError ||\n      err instanceof WorkflowStateError;\n\n    if (!isWorkflowError && announcementIdForAudit) {\n      // Best-effort audit: the workflow tx rolled back, so this write happens\n      // outside it. Failure to write is swallowed — we still rethrow the\n      // original error to the caller.\n      await prisma.auditLog\n        .create({\n          data: {\n            action: \"VERIFICATION_TRANSPORT_FAILED\",\n            entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n            entityId: itemId,\n            userId: reviewer.id,\n            announcementId: announcementIdForAudit,\n            metadata: {\n              error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err),\n              errorName: err instanceof Error ? err.name : \"unknown\",\n            },\n          },\n        })\n        .catch(() => undefined);\n    }\n    throw err;\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function rejectItem(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  itemId: string,\n  reviewer: SessionUser,\n  reason: string\n): Promise<void> {\n  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const item = await tx.reviewQueueItem.findUnique({\n      where: { id: itemId },\n    });\n    if (!item) {\n      throw new WorkflowNotFoundError(`review item ${itemId} not found`);\n    }\n    if (item.authorId === reviewer.id) {\n      throw new SelfReviewError();\n    }\n    if (item.claimedBy !== reviewer.id) {\n      throw new WorkflowAuthorizationError(\n        \"only the claiming reviewer may reject this item\"\n      );\n    }\n    if (item.status !== \"UNDER_REVIEW\") {\n      throw new WorkflowStateError(\n        `cannot reject an item in status ${item.status}`\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Inlined for the same atomicity reason as approveItem.\n    await tx.reviewQueueItem.update({\n      where: { id: itemId },\n      data: {\n        status: \"REJECTED\",\n        decisionNote: reason,\n        decidedAt: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n\n    await tx.announcement.update({\n      where: { id: item.announcementId },\n      data: { status: AnnouncementStatus.DRAFT },\n    });\n\n    await tx.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        action: \"REJECTED\",\n        entity: \"Announcement\",\n        entityId: item.announcementId,\n        userId: reviewer.id,\n        announcementId: item.announcementId,\n        metadata: { reviewQueueItemId: itemId, reason },\n      },\n    });\n\n    await tx.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        action: \"NOTIFICATION_QUEUED\",\n        entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n        entityId: itemId,\n        userId: reviewer.id,\n        announcementId: item.announcementId,\n        metadata: {\n          recipientId: item.authorId,\n          event: \"REJECTED\",\n        },\n      },\n    });\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function escalateOverdue(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  now: Date = new Date()\n): Promise<EscalateResult> {\n  const cutoff = new Date(now.getTime() - OVERDUE_AGE_MS);\n\n  return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const overdue = await tx.reviewQueueItem.findMany({\n      where: {\n        status: \"PENDING\",\n        claimedBy: null,\n        tier: 1,\n        createdAt: { lt: cutoff },\n      },\n      select: { id: true, announcementId: true, authorId: true },\n    });\n\n    if (overdue.length === 0) {\n      return { escalated: 0 };\n    }\n\n    await tx.reviewQueueItem.updateMany({\n      where: { id: { in: overdue.map((o) => o.id) } },\n      data: { tier: 2, escalatedAt: now },\n    });\n\n    // No acting user is passed (escalation is a system / scheduler operation);\n    // the audit row is attributed to the item's original author so the\n    // AuditLog → User foreign key remains satisfied.\n    await tx.auditLog.createMany({\n      data: overdue.map((o) => ({\n        action: \"ESCALATED\",\n        entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n        entityId: o.id,\n        userId: o.authorId,\n        announcementId: o.announcementId,\n        metadata: { tier: 2, escalatedAt: now.toISOString() },\n      })),\n    });\n\n    return { escalated: overdue.length };\n  });\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":411,"cache_read_input_tokens":81907,"output_tokens":13895,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":411,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":13895,"cache_read_input_tokens":81907,"cache_creation_input_tokens":411,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":411},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CamDRGBoyugr5sW5WjU35","type":"assistant","uuid":"3155748a-2893-49dd-ae1b-5b7cc4428d39","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:14:36.053Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

     metadata: { reviewQueueItemId: item.id, tier: 1 },\n      },\n    });\n\n    await tx.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        action: \"NOTIFICATION_QUEUED\",\n        entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n        entityId: item.id,\n        userId: user.id,\n        announcementId,\n        metadata: {\n          recipientRole: \"COMPLIANCE_OFFICER\",\n          event: \"SUBMIT_FOR_REVIEW\",\n        },\n      },\n    });\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function claimNext(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  reviewer: SessionUser\n): Promise<ClaimResult> {\n  if (\n    reviewer.role !== Role.ADMIN &&\n    reviewer.role !== Role.COMPLIANCE_OFFICER\n  ) {\n    throw new WorkflowAuthorizationError(\n      \"only ADMIN or COMPLIANCE_OFFICER may claim review items\"\n    );\n  }\n\n  const queue = createReviewQueueClient(prisma);\n\n  // Visible-to-reviewer pre-check: if no non-self item is pending, skip the\n  // claim entirely so we don't lock a self-authored row.\n  const visible = await queue.listPending({\n    excludeAuthorId: reviewer.id,\n    limit: 1,\n  });\n  if (visible.length === 0) {\n    return { kind: \"empty\" };\n  }\n\n  const result = await queue.claimNextItem(reviewer.id);\n  if (result.kind === \"empty\") return result;\n\n  // Defence in depth — claimNextItem (SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) does\n  // not filter by author. If the oldest pending row turns out to be authored\n  // by the reviewer (race vs. listPending), release the row back to the pool\n  // and reject the claim.\n  if (result.item.authorId === reviewer.id) {\n    await prisma.reviewQueueItem.update({\n      where: { id: result.item.id },\n      data: {\n        status: \"PENDING\",\n        claimedBy: null,\n        claimedAt: null,\n      },\n    });\n    throw new SelfReviewError(\n      `reviewer ${reviewer.id} cannot claim own authored item`\n    );\n  }\n\n  return result;\n}\n\nexport async function approveItem(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  itemId: string,\n  reviewer: SessionUser,\n  note: string,\n  deps: ApproveItemDeps\n): Promise<VerificationResult> {\n  let announcementIdForAudit: string | null = null;\n\n  try {\n    return await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n      const item = await tx.reviewQueueItem.findUnique({\n        where: { id: itemId },\n        include: { announcement: true },\n      });\n      if (!item) {\n        throw new WorkflowNotFoundError(`review item ${itemId} not found`);\n      }\n      announcementIdForAudit = item.announcementId;\n\n      if (item.authorId === reviewer.id) {\n        throw new SelfReviewError();\n      }\n      if (item.claimedBy !== reviewer.id) {\n        throw new WorkflowAuthorizationError(\n          \"only the claiming reviewer may approve this item\"\n        );\n      }\n      if (item.status !== \"UNDER_REVIEW\") {\n        throw new WorkflowStateError(\n          `cannot approve an item in status ${item.status}`\n        );\n      }\n\n      // The seeded queue.approve wraps its update in its own\n      // prisma.$transaction; Prisma forbids interactive nested transactions on\n      // a TransactionClient, so we inline the equivalent update here. That\n      // keeps the queue change, announcement state change, and audit row\n      // atomic: if verification fails, all three roll back together.\n      await tx.reviewQueueItem.update({\n        where: { id: itemId },\n        data: {\n          status: \"APPROVED\",\n          decisionNote: note,\n          decidedAt: new Date(),\n        },\n      });\n\n      const verdict = await deps.verification.verify({\n        id: item.announcement.id,\n        titleEn: item.announcement.titleEn,\n        titleAr: item.announcement.titleAr,\n        bodyEn: item.announcement.bodyEn,\n        bodyAr: item.announcement.bodyAr,\n      });\n\n      if (verdict.verdict === \"APPROVED\") {\n        await tx.announcement.update({\n          where: { id: item.announcementId },\n          data: {\n            status: AnnouncementStatus.PUBLISHED,\n            publishedAt: new Date(),\n          },\n        });\n        await tx.auditLog.create({\n          data: {\n            action: \"VERIFICATION_PASSED\",\n            entity: \"Announcement\",\n            entityId: item.announcementId,\n            userId: reviewer.id,\n            announcementId: item.announcementId,\n            metadata: {\n              reviewQueueItemId: itemId,\n              verifiedAt: verdict.verifiedAt.toISOString(),\n            },\n          },\n        });\n      } else {\n        await tx.announcement.update({\n          where: { id: item.announcementId },\n          data: { status: AnnouncementStatus.DRAFT },\n        });\n        await tx.auditLog.create({\n          data: {\n            action: \"VERIFICATION_REJECTED\",\n            entity: \"Announcement\",\n            entityId: item.announcementId,\n            userId: reviewer.id,\n            announcementId: item.announcementId,\n            metadata: {\n              reviewQueueItemId: itemId,\n              reason: verdict.reason ?? null,\n              verifiedAt: verdict.verifiedAt.toISOString(),\n            },\n          },\n        });\n      }\n\n      return verdict;\n    });\n  } catch (err) {\n    const isWorkflowError =\n      err instanceof SelfReviewError ||\n      err instanceof WorkflowAuthorizationError ||\n      err instanceof WorkflowNotFoundError ||\n      err instanceof WorkflowStateError;\n\n    if (!isWorkflowError && announcementIdForAudit) {\n      // Best-effort audit: the workflow tx rolled back, so this write happens\n      // outside it. Failure to write is swallowed — we still rethrow the\n      // original error to the caller.\n      await prisma.auditLog\n        .create({\n          data: {\n            action: \"VERIFICATION_TRANSPORT_FAILED\",\n            entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n            entityId: itemId,\n            userId: reviewer.id,\n            announcementId: announcementIdForAudit,\n            metadata: {\n              error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err),\n              errorName: err instanceof Error ? err.name : \"unknown\",\n            },\n          },\n        })\n        .catch(() => undefined);\n    }\n    throw err;\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function rejectItem(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  itemId: string,\n  reviewer: SessionUser,\n  reason: string\n): Promise<void> {\n  await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const item = await tx.reviewQueueItem.findUnique({\n      where: { id: itemId },\n    });\n    if (!item) {\n      throw new WorkflowNotFoundError(`review item ${itemId} not found`);\n    }\n    if (item.authorId === reviewer.id) {\n      throw new SelfReviewError();\n    }\n    if (item.claimedBy !== reviewer.id) {\n      throw new WorkflowAuthorizationError(\n        \"only the claiming reviewer may reject this item\"\n      );\n    }\n    if (item.status !== \"UNDER_REVIEW\") {\n      throw new WorkflowStateError(\n        `cannot reject an item in status ${item.status}`\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Inlined for the same atomicity reason as approveItem.\n    await tx.reviewQueueItem.update({\n      where: { id: itemId },\n      data: {\n        status: \"REJECTED\",\n        decisionNote: reason,\n        decidedAt: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n\n    await tx.announcement.update({\n      where: { id: item.announcementId },\n      data: { status: AnnouncementStatus.DRAFT },\n    });\n\n    await tx.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        action: \"REJECTED\",\n        entity: \"Announcement\",\n        entityId: item.announcementId,\n        userId: reviewer.id,\n        announcementId: item.announcementId,\n        metadata: { reviewQueueItemId: itemId, reason },\n      },\n    });\n\n    await tx.auditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        action: \"NOTIFICATION_QUEUED\",\n        entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n        entityId: itemId,\n        userId: reviewer.id,\n        announcementId: item.announcementId,\n        metadata: {\n          recipientId: item.authorId,\n          event: \"REJECTED\",\n        },\n      },\n    });\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function escalateOverdue(\n  prisma: PrismaClient,\n  now: Date = new Date()\n): Promise<EscalateResult> {\n  const cutoff = new Date(now.getTime() - OVERDUE_AGE_MS);\n\n  return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const overdue = await tx.reviewQueueItem.findMany({\n      where: {\n        status: \"PENDING\",\n        claimedBy: null,\n        tier: 1,\n        createdAt: { lt: cutoff },\n      },\n      select: { id: true, announcementId: true, authorId: true },\n    });\n\n    if (overdue.length === 0) {\n      return { escalated: 0 };\n    }\n\n    await tx.reviewQueueItem.updateMany({\n      where: { id: { in: overdue.map((o) => o.id) } },\n      data: { tier: 2, escalatedAt: now },\n    });\n\n    // No acting user is passed (escalation is a system / scheduler operation);\n    // the audit row is attributed to the item's original author so the\n    // AuditLog → User foreign key remains satisfied.\n    await tx.auditLog.createMany({\n      data: overdue.map((o) => ({\n        action: \"ESCALATED\",\n        entity: \"ReviewQueueItem\",\n        entityId: o.id,\n        userId: o.authorId,\n        announcementId: o.announcementId,\n        metadata: { tier: 2, escalatedAt: now.toISOString() },\n      })),\n    });\n\n    return { escalated: overdue.length };\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"3155748a-2893-49dd-ae1b-5b7cc4428d39","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

race test goes green","status":"completed","activeForm":"Fixing TOCTOU race in claim.ts"},{"content":"Update README with Level 2 instructions","status":"pending","activeForm":"Updating README with Level 2 instructions"},{"content":"Generate verbatim ai-session/transcript.md as final step","status":"pending","activeForm":"Generating verbatim ai-session transcript"}],"itemCount":12},"type":"attachment","uuid":"1da1b627-6db4-448c-aa04-e4a37620b0da","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:15:18.806Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}
{"parentUuid":"1da1b627-6db4-448c-aa04-e4a37620b0da","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_01DLGccqv9eKW8KWg155y2cZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Step 9 done. Summary:\n\n- **Migration `add_escalation_fields`** — added `tier Int @default(1)` and `escalatedAt DateTime?` to `ReviewQueueItem`. Applied to `admin_panel_l2`.\n- **`services/review-workflow.ts`** with five functions and four error classes (`SelfReviewError`, `WorkflowAuthorizationError`, `WorkflowStateError`, `WorkflowNotFoundError`).\n  - **`submitForReview`** — RBAC (ADMIN/CONTENT_MANAGER), validates announcement is `DRAFT` and not soft-deleted, then in one tx: announcement → `PENDING_REVIEW`, create `ReviewQueueItem` with `tier:1`, audit `SUBMIT_FOR_REVIEW`, audit `NOTIFICATION_QUEUED`.\n  - **`claimNext`** — RBAC (ADMIN/COMPLIANCE_OFFICER), pre-filters via `listPending({ excludeAuthorId })`, calls `queue.claimNextItem`, post-checks `authorId !== reviewer.id`, releases the row and throws `SelfReviewError` if a race grabbed a self-authored item.\n  - **`approveItem`** — single tx wraps queue update + verification + announcement state + audit. APPROVED → `PUBLISHED` + `publishedAt` + `VERIFICATION_PASSED` audit. REJECTED → `DRAFT` + `VERIFICATION_REJECTED` audit (with reason). Transport throw → tx rolls back, best-effort `VERIFICATION_TRANSPORT_FAILED` audit written outside the failed tx, error rethrown. Workflow validation errors are excluded from the best-effort audit.\n  - **`rejectItem`** — single tx: queue → `REJECTED` (with note), announcement → `DRAFT`, audit `REJECTED`, audit `NOTIFICATION_QUEUED`.\n  - **`escalateOverdue(now = new Date())`** — single tx: finds `PENDING && claimedBy = null && tier = 1 && createdAt < now - 48h`, updates to `tier:2` + `escalatedAt`, writes one `ESCALATED` audit per item.\n- **Inlining note** — the seeded library's `approve` and `reject` use their own internal `prisma.$transaction`. Prisma 7 forbids interactive nested transactions on a `TransactionClient`, so to honor the \"inside `prisma.$transaction`\" requirement, the queue-row updates are inlined inside the workflow tx with the same status/claimedBy/state guards as the library. A code comment calls out the reason.\n- **`escalateOverdue` actor** — the spec lists `escalateOverdue(now = new Date())` with no actor. The audit row's `userId` (FK to `User`) is attributed to the item's original author so the FK stays valid; comment explains the choice.\n- **Typecheck** clean. **`npm test`** — 4 files / 23 tests passed.\n- **Commit** — `0ee857f feat(workflow): review-workflow service layer`.\n\nTwo open notes for you:\n\n1. The audit attribution for `ESCALATED` uses the *item's author* (not a system or admin user) because the function signature has no actor. If you want admin attribution, I can extend the signature to `escalateOverdue(prisma, actor, now)` later.\n2. No new tests were added (your Step 9 instructions only said \"all should pass\"). Want me to add unit tests for separation-of-duties / verification-rollback / cached precedence / breaker before moving on, or save that for later?\n\nConfirm next step."}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":824,"cache_read_input_tokens":97178,"output_tokens":1246,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":824,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":1246,"cache_read_input_tokens":97178,"cache_creation_input_tokens":824,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":824},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CamDffJznpuErsWope6ax","type":"assistant","uuid":"03dcf89d-2c24-46b2-8360-fdf050173154","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:15:43.193Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{"parentUuid":"03dcf89d-2c24-46b2-8360-fdf050173154","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"3f212d50-6a0b-4164-a6e8-25d9dc8e3bdc","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Step 9 confirmed. Now Steps 10 and 11.\n\nStep 10 — API Routes (6 routes):\n\nCreate these files in admin-panel/app/api/:\n\n1. app/api/announcements/[id]/submit-for-review/route.ts (POST)\n- Auth: 401 if no session\n- RBAC: can(user, 'submitForReview') else 403\n- Call: submitForReview(id, user)\n- 200 on success, 409 on WorkflowStateError, 404 on WorkflowNotFoundError\n\n2. app/api/review-queue/route.ts (GET)\n- Auth: 401, RBAC: can(user, 'review') else 403\n- Call: listPending({ excludeAuthorId: user.id })\n- Return: { items }\n\n3. app/api/review-queue/claim/route.ts (POST)\n- Auth: 401, RBAC: can(user, 'review') else 403\n- Call: claimNext(user)\n- Return: the ClaimResult\n\n4. app/api/review-queue/[id]/approve/route.ts (POST)\n- Auth: 401, RBAC: can(user, 'review') else 403\n- Body: { note: string }\n- Call: approveItem(id, user, note, { verification: new MockVerificationAdapter() })\n- 200 on success, 409 on conflict\n\n5. app/api/review-queue/[id]/reject/route.ts (POST)\n- Auth: 401, RBAC: can(user, 'review') else 403\n- Body: { reason: string }\n- Call: rejectItem(id, user, reason)\n- 200 on success\n\n6. app/api/review-queue/escalate/route.ts (POST)\n- Auth: 401, RBAC: can(user, 'escalate') else 403\n- Call: escalateOverdue()\n- Return: { escalated: count }\n\nFor every route: read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ first for App Router patterns.\nUse params: Promise<{ id: string }> pattern (same as Level 1).\n\nAfter creating routes:\n- Run: npx tsc --noEmit\n- Run: npm test (all should pass)\n- Commit: \"feat(api): review-queue routes and submit-for-review\"\n\nStep 11 — UI Pages:\n\n1. app/admin/review-queue/page.tsx (server component)\n- Auth check: redirect if not can(user, 'review')\n- Fetch listPending({ excludeAuthorId: user.id })\n- Show table: announcement title, status, createdAt\n- Show \"Claim Next\" button\n\n2. app/admin/review-queue/ReviewActions.tsx (client component)\n- \"Claim Next\" button → POST /api/review-queue/claim\n- \"Approve\" button → POST /api/review-queue/{id}/approve\n- \"Reject\" button → POST /api/review-queue/{id}/reject (with reason input)\n\n3. app/admin/announcements/page.tsx\n- Add status column to the announcements list\n- Add \"Submit for Review\" button when status === 'DRAFT' and can(user, 'submitForReview')\n\n4. app/admin/layout.tsx\n- Add \"Review Queue\" sidebar link visible only when can(user, 'review')\n\nAfter creating UI:\n- Run: npx tsc --noEmit\n- Run: npm test (all should pass)\n- Commit: \"feat(ui): review queue page and submit-for-review button\"\n\nConfirm when both steps are done."}]},"uuid":"bf31c43e-4eb1-4696-9fb2-17855f328cc8","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:16:35.456Z","permissionMode":"auto","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{"parentUuid":"5a10cdcc-2936-46d8-8c41-210f74656fbe","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"3f212d50-6a0b-4164-a6e8-25d9dc8e3bdc","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RNSXhSyDEnuhWtbXwqHAki","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t---\n2\ttitle: route.js\n3\tdescription: API reference for the route.js special file.\n4\t---\n5\t\n6\tRoute Handlers allow you to create custom request handlers for a given route using the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) and [Response](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Response) APIs.\n7\t\n8\t```ts filename=\"route.ts\" switcher\n9\texport async function GET() {\n10\t  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })\n11\t}\n12\t```\n13\t\n14\t```js filename=\"route.js\" switcher\n15\texport async function GET() {\n16\t  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })\n17\t}\n18\t```\n19\t\n20\t## Reference\n21\t\n22\t### HTTP Methods\n23\t\n24\tA **route** file allows you to create custom request handlers for a given route. The following [HTTP methods](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods) are supported: `GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`, `HEAD`, and `OPTIONS`.\n25\t\n26\t```ts filename=\"route.ts\" switcher\n27\texport async function GET(request: Request) {}\n28\t\n29\texport async function HEAD(request: Request) {}\n30\t\n31\texport async function POST(request: Request) {}\n32\t\n33\texport async function PUT(request: Request) {}\n34\t\n35\texport async function DELETE(request: Request) {}\n36\t\n37\texport async function PATCH(request: Request) {}\n38\t\n39\t// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.\n40\texport async function OPTIONS(request: Request) {}\n41\t```\n42\t\n43\t```js filename=\"route.js\" switcher\n44\texport async function GET(request) {}\n45\t\n46\texport async function HEAD(request) {}\n47\t\n48\texport async function POST(request) {}\n49\t\n50\texport async function PUT(request) {}\n51\t\n52\texport async function DELETE(request) {}\n53\t\n54\texport async function PATCH(request) {}\n55\t\n56\t// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.\n57\texport async function OPTIONS(request) {}\n58\t```\n59\t\n60\t### Parameters\n61\t\n62\t#### `request` (optional)\n63\t\n64\tThe `request` object is a [NextRequest](/docs/app/api-reference/functions/next-request) object, which is an extension of the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) API. `NextRequest` gives you further control over the incoming request, including easily accessing `cookies` and an extended, parsed, URL object `nextUrl`.\n65\t\n66\t```ts filename=\"route.ts\" switcher\n67\timport type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'\n68\t\n69\texport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n70\t  const url = request.nextUrl\n71\t}\n72\t```\n73\t\n74\t```js filename=\"route.js\" switcher\n75\texport async function GET(request) {\n76\t  const url = request.nextUrl\n77\t}\n78\t```\n79\t\n80\t#### `context` (optional)\n81\t\n82\t- **`params`**: a promise that resolves to an object containing the [dynamic route parameters](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/dynamic-routes) for the current route.\n83\t\n84\t```ts filename=\"app/dashboard/[team]/route.ts\" switcher\n85\texport async function GET(\n86\t  request: Request,\n87\t  { params }: { params: Promise<{ team: string }> }\n88\t) {\n89\t  const { team } = await params\n90\t}\n91\t```\n92\t\n93\t```js filename=\"app/dashboard/[team]/route.js\" switcher\n94\texport async function GET(request, { params }) {\n95\t  const { team } = await params\n96\t}\n97\t```\n98\t\n99\t| Example                          | URL            | `params`                           |\n100\t| -------------------------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------- |"}]},"uuid":"0b7751ed-8279-4c94-bf39-6d7ad7055744","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:17:04.821Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/route.md","content":"---\ntitle: route.js\ndescription: API reference for the route.js special file.\n---\n\nRoute Handlers allow you to create custom request handlers for a given route using the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) and [Response](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Response) APIs.\n\n```ts filename=\"route.ts\" switcher\nexport async function GET() {\n  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })\n}\n```\n\n```js filename=\"route.js\" switcher\nexport async function GET() {\n  return Response.json({ message: 'Hello World' })\n}\n```\n\n## Reference\n\n### HTTP Methods\n\nA **route** file allows you to create custom request handlers for a given route. The following [HTTP methods](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/HTTP/Methods) are supported: `GET`, `POST`, `PUT`, `PATCH`, `DELETE`, `HEAD`, and `OPTIONS`.\n\n```ts filename=\"route.ts\" switcher\nexport async function GET(request: Request) {}\n\nexport async function HEAD(request: Request) {}\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request) {}\n\nexport async function PUT(request: Request) {}\n\nexport async function DELETE(request: Request) {}\n\nexport async function PATCH(request: Request) {}\n\n// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.\nexport async function OPTIONS(request: Request) {}\n```\n\n```js filename=\"route.js\" switcher\nexport async function GET(request) {}\n\nexport async function HEAD(request) {}\n\nexport async function POST(request) {}\n\nexport async function PUT(request) {}\n\nexport async function DELETE(request) {}\n\nexport async function PATCH(request) {}\n\n// If `OPTIONS` is not defined, Next.js will automatically implement `OPTIONS` and set the appropriate Response `Allow` header depending on the other methods defined in the Route Handler.\nexport async function OPTIONS(request) {}\n```\n\n### Parameters\n\n#### `request` (optional)\n\nThe `request` object is a [NextRequest](/docs/app/api-reference/functions/next-request) object, which is an extension of the Web [Request](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Request) API. `NextRequest` gives you further control over the incoming request, including easily accessing `cookies` and an extended, parsed, URL object `nextUrl`.\n\n```ts filename=\"route.ts\" switcher\nimport type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const url = request.nextUrl\n}\n```\n\n```js filename=\"route.js\" switcher\nexport async function GET(request) {\n  const url = request.nextUrl\n}\n```\n\n#### `context` (optional)\n\n- **`params`**: a promise that resolves to an object containing the [dynamic route parameters](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/dynamic-routes) for the current route.\n\n```ts filename=\"app/dashboard/[team]/route.ts\" switcher\nexport async function GET(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ team: string }> }\n) {\n  const { team } = await params\n}\n```\n\n```js filename=\"app/dashboard/[team]/route.js\" switcher\nexport async function GET(request, { params }) {\n  const { team } = await params\n}\n```\n\n| Example                          | URL            | `params`                           |\n| -------------------------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------- {"parentUuid":"56741fa7-4688-49bc-9ecb-ca6fee9b59ed","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"3f212d50-6a0b-4164-a6e8-25d9dc8e3bdc","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01T4Q8hYYKc5jxpovz1Uszrf","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n2\timport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\n3\timport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\n4\timport { announcementSchema } from \"@/lib/validations\";\n5\timport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\n6\timport { writeAuditLog } from \"@/lib/audit\";\n7\t\n8\texport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n9\t  const user = getSessionUser();\n10\t  if (!user) {\n11\t    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n12\t  }\n13\t  if (!can(user, \"create\")) {\n14\t    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n15\t  }\n16\t\n17\t  let raw: unknown;\n18\t  try {\n19\t    raw = await req.json();\n20\t  } catch {\n21\t    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"INVALID_JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n22\t  }\n23\t\n24\t  const parsed = announcementSchema.safeParse(raw);\n25\t  if (!parsed.success) {\n26\t    return NextResponse.json(\n27\t      {\n28\t        error: \"VALIDATION_FAILED\",\n29\t        fieldErrors: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors,\n30\t      },\n31\t      { status: 422 }\n32\t    );\n33\t  }\n34\t\n35\t  const announcement = await prisma.announcement.create({\n36\t    data: { ...parsed.data, authorId: user.id },\n37\t  });\n38\t\n39\t  await writeAuditLog({\n40\t    action: \"CREATE\",\n41\t    entity: \"Announcement\",\n42\t { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport { announcementSchema } from \"@/lib/validations\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport { writeAuditLog } from \"@/lib/audit\";\n\ntype Ctx = { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };\n\nexport async function PATCH(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!user) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n  if (!can(user, \"edit\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let raw: unknown;\n  try {\n    raw = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"INVALID_JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const parsed = announcementSchema.safeParse(raw);\n  if (!parsed.success) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error: \"VALIDATION_FAILED\",\n        fieldErrors: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors,\n      },\n      { status: 422 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const existing = await prisma.announcement.findFirst({\n    where: { id, deletedAt: null },\n  });\n  if (!existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"NOT_FOUND\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const updated = await prisma.announcement.update({\n    where: { id: existing.id },\n    data: parsed.data,\n  });\n\n  await writeAuditLog({\n    action: \"UPDATE\",\n    entity: \"Announcement\",\n    entityId: updated.id,\n    userId: user.id,\n    announcementId: updated.id,\n    metadata: {\n      before: {\n        titleEn: existing.titleEn,\n        titleAr: existing.titleAr,\n        bodyEn: existing.bodyEn,\n        bodyAr: existing.bodyAr,\n      },\n      after: parsed.data,\n    },\n  });\n\n  return NextResponse.json(updated);\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(_req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!user) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n  if (!can(user, \"delete\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const result = await prisma.announcement.updateMany({\n    where: { id, deletedAt: null },\n    data: { deletedAt: new Date() },\n  });\n\n  if (result.count === 0) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"NOT_FOUND\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  await writeAuditLog({\n    action: \"DELETE\",\n    entity: \"Announcement\",\n    entityId: id,\n    userId: user.id,\n    announcementId: id,\n  });\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":99,"startLine":1,"totalLines":99}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"9d9e8962-1e7a-41bd-9fed-10cac77f72ce","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{"parentUuid":"426bccb4-1152-4605-9a00-05144d70642a","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_01AjgAcAfS4vMKTCzm97NF36","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01TRuWJJMGmnY4hScSV5hH8L","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/app/api/announcements/[id]/submit-for-review/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport {\n  WorkflowAuthorizationError,\n  WorkflowNotFoundError,\n  WorkflowStateError,\n  submitForReview,\n} from \"@/services/review-workflow\";\n\ntype Ctx = { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };\n\nexport async function POST(_req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!user) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n  if (!can(user, \"submitForReview\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    await submitForReview(prisma, id, user);\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  } catch (err) {\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowNotFoundError) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"NOT_FOUND\" }, { status: 404 });\n    }\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowStateError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"STATE_CONFLICT\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowAuthorizationError) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n    throw err;\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":503,"cache_read_input_tokens":107135,"output_tokens":711,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":503,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":711,"cache_read_input_tokens":107135,"cache_creation_input_tokens":503,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":503},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CamDrGCW2Uaf9rUUfEk52","type":"assistant","uuid":"418afe92-bf39-45f4-9bc1-7b1c87e21bea","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:17:54.806Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{ NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport { createReviewQueueClient } from \"@/lib/review-queue/src\";\n\nexport async function GET(_req: NextRequest) {\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!user) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n  if (!can(user, \"review\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const queue = createReviewQueueClient(prisma);\n  const items = await queue.listPending({ excludeAuthorId: user.id });\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ items { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport {\n  SelfReviewError,\n  WorkflowAuthorizationError,\n  claimNext,\n} from \"@/services/review-workflow\";\n\nexport async function POST(_req: NextRequest) {\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!user) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n  if (!can(user, \"review\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const result = await claimNext(prisma, user);\n    return NextResponse.json(result);\n  } catch (err) {\n    if (err instanceof SelfReviewError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"SELF_REVIEW\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 403 }\n      );\n    }\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowAuthorizationError) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n    throw err;\n {"parentUuid":"1baf0c8c-a16b-4ecc-b212-e724e4f7d423","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_01WYNGoojKV7htXKR5LraBSR","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01NBEDUcxeeGyQmCKVpdiFN1","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/app/api/review-queue/[id]/approve/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport { reviewApproveSchema } from \"@/lib/validations\";\nimport { MockVerificationAdapter } from \"@/lib/adapters/verification\";\nimport {\n  SelfReviewError,\n  WorkflowAuthorizationError,\n  WorkflowNotFoundError,\n  WorkflowStateError,\n  approveItem,\n} from \"@/services/review-workflow\";\n\ntype Ctx = { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!user) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n  if (!can(user, \"review\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let raw: unknown;\n  try {\n    raw = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"INVALID_JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n  const parsed = reviewApproveSchema.safeParse(raw);\n  if (!parsed.success) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error: \"VALIDATION_FAILED\",\n        fieldErrors: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors,\n      },\n      { status: 422 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const verdict = await approveItem(prisma, id, user, parsed.data.note, {\n      verification: new MockVerificationAdapter(),\n    });\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, verdict });\n  } catch (err) {\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowNotFoundError) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"NOT_FOUND\" }, { status: 404 });\n    }\n    if (err instanceof SelfReviewError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"SELF_REVIEW\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 403 }\n      );\n    }\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowAuthorizationError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"FORBIDDEN\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 403 }\n      );\n    }\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowStateError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"STATE_CONFLICT\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n    // Verification transport / breaker failure → 503; the service has already\n    // written a best-effort VERIFICATION_TRANSPORT_FAILED audit.\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error: \"VERIFICATION_UNAVAILABLE\",\n        message: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err),\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":651,"cache_read_input_tokens":108951,"output_tokens":1161,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":651,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":1161,"cache_read_input_tokens":108951,"cache_creation_input_tokens":651,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":651},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CamDtnCba2oMX3nZHxK3u","type":"assistant","uuid":"1cb1d113-4dec-4883-8a22-bf46b178f008","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:18:30.736Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{ NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport { reviewApproveSchema } from \"@/lib/validations\";\nimport { MockVerificationAdapter } from \"@/lib/adapters/verification\";\nimport {\n  SelfReviewError,\n  WorkflowAuthorizationError,\n  WorkflowNotFoundError,\n  WorkflowStateError,\n  approveItem,\n} from \"@/services/review-workflow\";\n\ntype Ctx = { params: Promise<{ id: string }> };\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: Ctx) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!user) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"UNAUTHORIZED\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n  if (!can(user, \"review\")) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"FORBIDDEN\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let raw: unknown;\n  try {\n    raw = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"INVALID_JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n  const parsed = reviewApproveSchema.safeParse(raw);\n  if (!parsed.success) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error: \"VALIDATION_FAILED\",\n        fieldErrors: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors,\n      },\n      { status: 422 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const verdict = await approveItem(prisma, id, user, parsed.data.note, {\n      verification: new MockVerificationAdapter(),\n    });\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, verdict });\n  } catch (err) {\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowNotFoundError) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"NOT_FOUND\" }, { status: 404 });\n    }\n    if (err instanceof SelfReviewError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"SELF_REVIEW\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 403 }\n      );\n    }\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowAuthorizationError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"FORBIDDEN\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 403 }\n      );\n    }\n    if (err instanceof WorkflowStateError) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"STATE_CONFLICT\", message: err.message },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n    // Verification transport / breaker failure → 503; the service has already\n    // written a best-effort VERIFICATION_TRANSPORT_FAILED audit.\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error: \"VERIFICATION_UNAVAILABLE\",\n        message: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err),\n      },\n      { status: 503 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"1cb1d113-4dec-4883-8a22-bf46b178f008","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{"parentUuid":"b7621b03-cb60-4405-ba9a-c677e8edce84","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"3f212d50-6a0b-4164-a6e8-25d9dc8e3bdc","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012P1HdJNYh2d8V6dFqB5RSn","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport Link from \"next/link\";\n2\timport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\n3\timport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\n4\timport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\n5\timport { paginationSchema } from \"@/lib/validations\";\n6\t\n7\ttype SearchParams = Promise<{ page?: string; pageSize?: string }>;\n8\t\n9\texport default async function AnnouncementsPage({\n10\t  searchParams,\n11\t}: {\n12\t  searchParams: SearchParams;\n13\t}) {\n14\t  const sp = await searchParams;\n15\t  const { page, pageSize } = paginationSchema.parse({\n16\t    page: sp.page,\n17\t    pageSize: sp.pageSize,\n18\t  });\n19\t\n20\t  const user = getSessionUser();\n21\t  const canEdit = can(user, \"edit\");\n22\t\n23\t  const where = { deletedAt: null };\n24\t  const [items, total] = await Promise.all([\n25\t    prisma.announcement.findMany({\n26\t      where,\n27\t      orderBy: { createdAt: \"desc\" },\n28\t      skip: (page - 1) * pageSize,\n29\t      take: pageSize,\n30\t    }),\n31\t    prisma.announcement.count({ where }),\n32\t  ]);\n33\t\n34\t  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(total / pageSize));\n35\t\n36\t  return (\n37\t    <main className=\"p-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto\">\n38\t      <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-4\">\n39\t        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-semibold\">Announcements</h1>\n40\t        {canEdit && (\n41\t          <Link\n42\t            href=\"/admin/announcements/new\"\n43\t            className=\"bg-black text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-sm\"\n44\t          >\n45\t            New\n46\t          </Link>\n47\t        )}\n48\t      </div>\n49\t\n50\t      <ul className=\"divide-y border rounded\">\n51\t        {items.map((a) => (\n52\t          <li\n53\t            key={a.id}\n54\t            className=\"p-3 flex justify-between items-center gap-4\"\n55\t          >\n56\t            <div className=\"min-w-0 flex-1\">\n57\t              <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{a.titleEn}</div>\n58\t              <div\n59\t                className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 truncate\"\n60\t                dir=\"rtl\"\n61\t              >\n62\t                {a.titleAr}\n63\t              </div>\n64\t            </div>\n65\t            {canEdit && (\n66\t              <Link\n67\t                href={`/admin/announcements/${a.id}/edit`}\n68\t                className=\"underline text-sm shrink-0\"\n69\t              >\n70\t                Edit\n71\t              </Link>\n72\t            )}\n73\t          </li>\n74\t        ))}\n75\t        {items.length === 0 && (\n76\t          <li className=\"p-4 text-gray-500 text-sm\">No announcements.</li>\n77\t        )}\n78\t      </ul>\n79\t\n80\t      <nav className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mt-4 text-sm\">\n81\t        {page > 1 ? (\n82\t          <Link\n83\t            href={`/admin/announcements?page=${page - 1}&pageSize=${pageSize}`}\n84\t            className=\"underline\"\n85\t          >\n86\t            Prev\n87\t          </Link>\n88\t        ) : (\n89\t          <span className=\"text-gray-400\">Prev</span>\n90\t        )}\n91\t        <span>\n92\t          Page {page} / {totalPages} &middot; {total} total\n93\t        </span>\n94\t        {page < totalPages ? (\n95\t          <Link\n96\t            href={`/admin/announcements?page=${page + 1}&pageSize=${pageSize}`}\n97\t            className=\"underline\"\n98\t          >\n99\t            Next\n100\t          </Link>\n101\t        ) : (\n102\t          <span className=\"text-gray-400\">Next</span>\n103\t        )}\n104\t      </nav>\n105\t    </main>\n106\t  );\n107\t}\n108\t"}]},"uuid":"6fdaa328-ffe3-4150-a516-712513fb9906","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:19:54.809Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/app/admin/announcements/page.tsx","content":"import Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport { paginationSchema } from \"@/lib/validations\";\n\ntype SearchParams = Promise<{ page?: string; pageSize?: string }>;\n\nexport default async function AnnouncementsPage({\n  searchParams,\n}: {\n  searchParams: SearchParams;\n}) {\n  const sp = await searchParams;\n  const { page, pageSize } = paginationSchema.parse({\n    page: sp.page,\n    pageSize: sp.pageSize,\n  });\n\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  const canEdit = can(user, \"edit\");\n\n  const where = { deletedAt: null };\n  const [items, total] = await Promise.all([\n    prisma.announcement.findMany({\n      where,\n      orderBy: { createdAt: \"desc\" },\n      skip: (page - 1) * pageSize,\n      take: pageSize,\n    }),\n    prisma.announcement.count({ where }),\n  ]);\n\n  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(total / pageSize));\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"p-6 max-w-4xl mx-auto\">\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-semibold\">Announcements</h1>\n        {canEdit && (\n          <Link\n            href=\"/admin/announcements/new\"\n            className=\"bg-black text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-sm\"\n          >\n            New\n          </Link>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      <ul className=\"divide-y border rounded\">\n        {items.map((a) => (\n          <li\n            key={a.id}\n            className=\"p-3 flex justify-between items-center gap-4\"\n          >\n            <div className=\"min-w-0 flex-1\">\n              <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{a.titleEn}</div>\n              <div\n                className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 truncate\"\n                dir=\"rtl\"\n              >\n                {a.titleAr}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            {canEdit && (\n              <Link\n                href={`/admin/announcements/${a.id}/edit`}\n                className=\"underline text-sm shrink-0\"\n              >\n                Edit\n              </Link>\n            )}\n          </li>\n        ))}\n        {items.length === 0 && (\n          <li className=\"p-4 text-gray-500 text-sm\">No announcements.</li>\n        )}\n      </ul>\n\n      <nav className=\"flex items-center gap-3 mt-4 text-sm\">\n        {page > 1 ? (\n          <Link\n            href={`/admin/announcements?page=${page - 1}&pageSize=${pageSize}`}\n            className=\"underline\"\n          >\n            Prev\n          </Link>\n        ) : (\n          <span className=\"text-gray-400\">Prev</span>\n        )}\n        <span>\n          Page {page} / {totalPages} &middot; {total} total\n        </span>\n        {page < totalPages ? (\n86\t          <textarea\n87\t            dir={dir}\n88\t            rows={4}\n89\t            className=\"w-full border rounded p-2\"\n90\t            value={form[name]}\n91\t            onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, [name]: e.target.value })}\n92\t          />\n93\t        ) : (\n94\t          <input\n95\t            dir={dir}\n96\t            className=\"w-full border rounded p-2\"\n97\t            value={form[name]}\n98\t            onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, [name]: e.target.value })}\n99\t          />\n100\t        )}\n101\t        {errs && errs.length > 0 && (\n102\t          <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 mt-1\">{errs.join(\", \")}</p>\n103\t        )}\n104\t      </label>\n105\t    );\n106\t  }\n107\t\n108\t  return (\n109\t    <form onSubmit={onSave} className=\"space-y-4\">\n110\t      {topError && (\n111\t        <p className=\"text-red-600 text-sm\">{topError}</p>\n112\t      )}\n113\t      {renderField(\"titleEn\", \"Title (EN)\", \"ltr\")}\n114\t      {renderField(\"titleAr\", \"Title (AR)\", \"rtl\")}\n115\t      {renderField(\"bodyEn\", \"Body (EN)\", \"ltr\", true)}\n116\t      {renderField(\"bodyAr\", \"Body (AR)\", \"rtl\", true)}\n117\t      <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n118\t        <button\n119\t          type=\"submit\"\n120\t          disabled={busy}\n121\t          className=\"bg-black text-white px-4 py-2 rounded disabled:opacity-50\"\n122\t        >\n123\t          {busy ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save\"}\n124\t        </button>\n125\t        {canDelete && (\n126\t          <button\n127\t            type=\"button\"\n128\t            onClick={onDelete}\n129\t            disabled={busy}\n130\t            className=\"border border-red-600 text-red-600 px-4 py-2 rounded disabled:opacity-50\"\n131\t          >\n132\t            Delete\n133\t          </button>\n134\t        )}\n135\t      </div>\n136\t    </form>\n137\t  );\n138\t}\n139\t"}]},"uuid":"2d46c04e-516c-4d61-b853-767312775710","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:20:00.794Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/app/admin/announcements/[id]/edit/EditForm.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ntype Fields = {\n  titleEn: string;\n  titleAr: string;\n  bodyEn: string;\n  bodyAr: string;\n};\n\ntype FieldErrors = Partial<Record<keyof Fields, string[]>>;\n\nexport default function EditForm({\n  id,\n  initial,\n  canDelete,\n}: {\n  id: string;\n  initial: Fields;\n  canDelete: boolean;\n}) {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [form, setForm] = useState<Fields>(initial);\n  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<FieldErrors>({});\n  const [topError, setTopError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n\n  async function onSave(e: React.FormEvent) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setBusy(true);\n    setErrors({});\n    setTopError(null);\n\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/announcements/${id}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      headers: { \"content-type\": \"application/json\" },\n      body: JSON.stringify(form),\n    });\n    const body = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    setBusy(false);\n\n    if (res.ok) {\n      router.push(\"/admin/announcements\");\n      router.refresh();\n      return;\n    }\n    if (res.status === 422) {\n      setErrors(body.fieldErrors ?? {});\n      return;\n    }\n    setTopError(body.error ?? `Request failed (${res.status})`);\n  }\n\n  async function onDelete() {\n    if (!confirm(\"Delete this announcement?\")) return;\n    setBusy(true);\n    setTopError(null);\n\n    const res = await fetch(`/api/announcements/${id}`, {\n      method: \"DELETE\",\n    });\n    setBusy(false);\n\n    if (res.ok) {\n      router.push(\"/admin/announcements\");\n      router.refresh();\n      return;\n    }\n    const body = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    setTopError(body.error ?? `Delete failed (${res.status})`);\n  }\n\n  function renderField(\n    name: keyof Fields,\n    label: string,\n    dir: \"ltr\" | \"rtl\",\n    multiline = false\n  ) {\n    const errs = errors[name];\n    return (\n      <label className=\"block\">\n        <span className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">{label}</span>\n        {multiline ? (\n          <textarea\n            dir={dir}\n            rows={4}\n            className=\"w-full border rounded p-2\"\n            value={form[name]}\n            onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, [name]: e.target.value })}\n          />\n        ) : (\n          <input\n            dir={dir}\n            className=\"w-full border rounded p-2\"\n            value={form[name]}\n            onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, [name]: e.target.value })}\n          />\n        )}\n        {errs && errs.length > 0 && (\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 mt-1\">{errs.join(\", \")}</p>\n        )}\n      </label>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <form onSubmit={onSave} className=\"space-y-4\">\n      {topError && (\n        <p className=\"text-red-600 text-sm\">{topError}</p>\n      )}\n      {renderField(\"titleEn\", \"Title (EN)\", \"ltr\")}\n      {renderField(\"titleAr\", \"Title (AR)\", \"rtl\")}\n      {renderField(\"bodyEn\", \"Body (EN)\", \"ltr\", true)}\n      {renderField(\"bodyAr\", \"Body (AR)\", \"rtl\", true)}\n      <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n        <button\n          type=\"submit\"\n          disabled={busy}\n          className=\"bg-black text-white px-4 py-2 rounded disabled:opacity-50\"\n        >\n          {busy ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save\"}\n        </button>\n        {canDelete && (\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={onDelete}\n            disabled={busy}\n            className=\"border border-red-600 text-red-600 px-4 py-2 rounded disabled:opacity-50\"\n          >\n            Delete\n          </button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </form>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":139,"startLine":1,"totalLines":139}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"5643c531-5fa6-41db-8b8e-a8b9d891126c","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{"parentUuid":"c1059e4e-c52f-4958-a81f-c840b482694c","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_01VRX9vZCqpfvJXojGnrRDkG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01WdUzoEracXvdELsgC3zZpj","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/app/admin/review-queue/page.tsx","content":"import { redirect } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/prisma\";\nimport { getSessionUser } from \"@/lib/auth\";\nimport { can } from \"@/lib/rbac\";\nimport ReviewActions from \"./ReviewActions\";\n\nexport default async function ReviewQueuePage() {\n  const user = getSessionUser();\n  if (!can(user, \"review\")) {\n    redirect(\"/admin\");\n  }\n\n  // Two slices the reviewer needs to see together:\n  //   • PENDING items not authored by the current user — claim candidates.\n  //   • UNDER_REVIEW items the current user has already claimed — approve / reject candidates.\n  // listPending only returns the first slice; we read both directly so the\n  // page can show the reviewer's full active surface in one table.\n  const [pending, mine] = await Promise.all([\n    prisma.reviewQueueItem.findMany({\n      where: {\n        status: \"PENDING\",\n        claimedBy: null,\n        authorId: { not: user!.id },\n      },\n      orderBy: { createdAt: \"asc\" },\n      include: {\n        announcement: {\n          select: { id: true, titleEn: true, titleAr: true },\n        },\n      },\n    }),\n    prisma.reviewQueueItem.findMany({\n      where: {\n        status: \"UNDER_REVIEW\",\n        claimedBy: user!.id,\n      },\n      orderBy: { claimedAt: \"asc\" },\n      include: {\n        announcement: {\n          select: { id: true, titleEn: true, titleAr: true },\n        },\n      },\n    }),\n  ]);\n\n  type Row = (typeof pending)[number];\n  const rows: Row[] = [...mine, ...pending];\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"p-6 max-w-5xl mx-auto\">\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-semibold\">Review queue</h1>\n        <ReviewActions mode=\"claim-next\" />\n      </div>\n\n      <table className=\"w-full border rounded text-sm\">\n        <thead className=\"bg-gray-50 text-left\">\n          <tr>\n            <th className=\"p-2 font-medium\">Announcement</th>\n            <th className=\"p-2 font-medium\">Status</th>\n            <th className=\"p-2 font-medium\">Tier</th>\n            <th className=\"p-2 font-medium\">Created</th>\n            <th className=\"p-2 font-medium text-right\">Actions</th>\n          </tr>\n        </thead>\n        <tbody className=\"divide-y\">\n          {rows.map((r) => (\n            <tr key={r.id}>\n              <td className=\"p-2\">\n                <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">\n                  {r.announcement.titleEn}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 truncate\"\n                  dir=\"rtl\"\n                >\n                  {r.announcement.titleAr}\n                </div>\n              </td>\n              <td className=\"p-2\">{r.status}</td>\n              <td className=\"p-2\">{r.tier}</td>\n              <td className=\"p-2 text-gray-500\">\n                {new Date(r.createdAt).toLocaleString()}\n              </td>\n              <td className=\"p-2 text-right\">\n                {r.status === \"UNDER_REVIEW\" && r.claimedBy === user!.id ? (\n                  <ReviewActions mode=\"decide\" itemId={r.id} />\n                ) : (\n                  <span className=\"text-gray-400 text-xs\">—</span>\n                )}\n              </td>\n            </tr>\n          ))}\n          {rows.length === 0 && (\n            <tr>\n              <td className=\"p-4 text-gray-500\" colSpan={5}>\n                Nothing to review.\n              </td>\n            </tr>\n          )}\n        </tbody>\n      </table>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1808,"cache_read_input_tokens":120106,"output_tokens":1468,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1808,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":1468,"cache_read_input_tokens":120106,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1808,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1808},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CamE5AoR95yAV5xFEdXyP","type":"assistant","uuid":"70bce7ca-b0e2-44e8-a52f-0b6aa0bdddaf","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:20:57.209Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}

{"parentUuid":"395545e1-2226-4c89-aebe-f668316caec2","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-7","id":"msg_01Rudub5GDX5Y95YUuQR5ss8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G56kchy8RES5s551JuL9NA","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment/admin-panel/app/admin/review-queue/ReviewActions.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ntype Props =\n  | { mode: \"claim-next\"; itemId?: never }\n  | { mode: \"decide\"; itemId: string };\n\nexport default function ReviewActions(props: Props) {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [reason, setReason] = useState(\"\");\n\n  async function call(path: string, body?: unknown): Promise<void> {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(null);\n    const res = await fetch(path, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: body ? { \"content-type\": \"application/json\" } : undefined,\n      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    });\n    setBusy(false);\n    if (!res.ok) {\n      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n      setError(payload.message ?? payload.error ?? `Request failed (${res.status})`);\n      return;\n    }\n    router.refresh();\n  }\n\n  if (props.mode === \"claim-next\") {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n        {error && <span className=\"text-red-600 text-xs\">{error}</span>}\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          disabled={busy}\n          onClick={() => call(\"/api/review-queue/claim\")}\n          className=\"bg-black text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-sm disabled:opacity-50\"\n        >\n          {busy ? \"Claiming...\" : \"Claim next\"}\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col items-end gap-1\">\n      {error && <span className=\"text-red-600 text-xs\">{error}</span>}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n        <input\n          value={reason}\n          onChange={(e) => setReason(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder=\"Reason / note\"\n          className=\"border rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs\"\n JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    });\n    setBusy(false);\n    if (!res.ok) {\n      const payload = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n      setError(payload.message ?? payload.error ?? `Request failed (${res.status})`);\n      return;\n    }\n    router.refresh();\n  }\n\n  if (props.mode === \"claim-next\") {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n        {error && <span className=\"text-red-600 text-xs\">{error}</span>}\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          disabled={busy}\n          onClick={() => call(\"/api/review-queue/claim\")}\n          className=\"bg-black text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-sm disabled:opacity-50\"\n        >\n          {busy ? \"Claiming...\" : \"Claim next\"}\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col items-end gap-1\">\n      {error && <span className=\"text-red-600 text-xs\">{error}</span>}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n        <input\n          value={reason}\n          onChange={(e) => setReason(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder=\"Reason / note\"\n          className=\"border rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs\"\n        />\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          disabled={busy || reason.trim().length === 0}\n          onClick={() =>\n            call(`/api/review-queue/${props.itemId}/approve`, {\n              note: reason,\n            })\n          }\n          className=\"bg-green-700 text-white px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs disabled:opacity-50\"\n        >\n          Approve\n        </button>\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          disabled={busy || reason.trim().length === 0}\n          onClick={() =>\n            call(`/api/review-queue/${props.itemId}/reject`, {\n              reason,\n            })\n          }\n          className=\"border border-red-600 text-red-600 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs disabled:opacity-50\"\n        >\n          Reject\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"6e0ed4c0-fe5a-4fed-bdc4-7d4baeddbb4c","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"/home/sameh/Downloads/level-2/nodejs-nextjs-assessment","sessionId":"6143e2c6-2304-4368-b72e-8b39bfc968b5","version":"2.1.131","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"delightful-sleeping-crane"}
